name: Mushroom Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms to remove any dirt.
2. Slice chanterelles and cultivated mushrooms; trim and discard stems of shiitake mushrooms or root tips of oyster mushrooms.
3. Bring 4 quarts of cold, salted water to a boil over high heat.
4. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat and add the mushrooms, garlic, shallots, and salt. Cook, stirring, for 15 minutes.
5. Add sherry; increase the heat to high. Cook for 2 minutes.
6. Add cream. Cook until the liquid reduces to a sauce-like consistency and coats a spoon.
7. Remove from heat and keep warm until pasta cooks.
8. Add pasta to the boiling water, cook until desired doneness, drain, and toss with mushroom sauce.
9. Place on a serving platter or in a large serving bowl and serve immediately; offer grated cheese.
